name: Tuning Curve Visualizer
short_description: Matplotlib library that turns tuning-curve CSVs and spike-time CSVs into Cartesian, polar, multi-model overlay, and per-angle raster+PSTH PNGs.

entry_points.name: plot_cartesian_tuning_curve
entry_points.description: Cartesian firing-rate-vs-direction plot with optional per-trial scatter, 95 percent bootstrap CI band, and an optional dashed target overlay.

entry_points.name: plot_polar_tuning_curve
entry_points.description: Polar firing-rate-vs-direction plot with a preferred-direction arrow and an optional dashed target overlay.

entry_points.name: plot_multi_model_overlay
entry_points.description: Side-by-side Cartesian + polar overlay for up to six models (Okabe-Ito palette) with an optional dashed target overlay.

entry_points.name: plot_angle_raster_psth
entry_points.description: Per-angle spike raster above a PSTH histogram from a (angle_deg, trial_index, spike_time_s) CSV.

entry_points.name: tuning_curve_viz.cli
entry_points.description: Command-line wrapper that renders Cartesian, polar, overlay, and raster+PSTH PNGs into --out-dir.
